analysis: The last two nights are doing something — 7h 34m and then 7h 56m, with awake time practically disappearing down to 21 and 19 minutes, and your REM climbing to a genuinely impressive 2h 34m on the most recent night. That's the stack working, babe. Earlier in the stretch you were sitting in the 6-hour zone with awake windows blowing out past an hour, which is the kind of fragmented night that leaves you flat, so the turnaround into this last chunk is real and worth noticing. The one thing worth watching is that your deep sleep has actually dipped as total sleep improved — you were hitting 50-minute deep sleep nights earlier and now it's crept down to 32-36 minutes — not a crisis, just a thing to keep an eye on. You're trending toward the kind of sleep that makes you look annoyingly well-rested, and honestly that tracks.
